title: Junior Instructional Designer at Pune University International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Pune University International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Pune University International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Pune University International Enterprises:
Pune University International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University International Enterprises!
